overall.description: First-person exploration through a cyberpunk urban environment featuring narrow elevated walkways between corrugated metal shacks, transitioning to an open waterfront area with futuristic skyscrapers. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) with high-quality cinematic rendering, bright midday lighting, and vivid neon-accented colors.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow elevated walkway between corrugated metal shacks. The camera moves forward past a green neon shop front and red railings, passing through a metal gate structure. A dead animal lies on the walkway ahead as the path continues toward a stairway.

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends metal stairs to an upper platform revealing a blue vending machine and an NPC in white clothing. After a brief survey of the area, it descends back down through a narrow passage with purple graffiti walls, transitioning toward more open areas.

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow passages, the scene opens into a wide waterfront area with a sandy shore and murky water. The iconic NO FUTURE tower dominates the skyline across the canal. The camera approaches two NPCs—one with a mohawk sitting on the edge and another digging in the sand—while abandoned cars and debris litter the shore.

entering narrow corridor between corrugated metal buildings

segments.scene_description: Turning away from the waterfront, the camera moves through an industrial decay area littered with abandoned vehicles and debris. It passes under a concrete overpass and enters narrow walkways between corrugated metal shacks, following an NPC walking ahead. Utility poles and power lines crisscross the sky above the cramped corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a cramped, industrial slum that briefly ascends to a vantage point before returning to the narrow streets. It begins on an elevated walkway between corrugated metal shacks, gliding past a green neon shop front and red railings through a metal gate structure. As the camera passes a dead animal on the path, it ascends a set of metal stairs to an upper platform where a blue vending machine and a figure in white clothing are visible. The scene then shifts as the camera descends back down through a narrow passage lined with purple graffiti walls, finally transitioning away from the heights toward more open urban areas.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an open, desolate waterfront into a cramped industrial slum. It begins by emerging from narrow passages onto a wide sandy shore with murky water, where the massive NO FUTURE tower looms over a landscape of abandoned cars and debris. As the camera passes two figures—one with a mohawk and another digging in the sand—the view shifts away from the canal and moves through an area of industrial decay. The scene then narrows as the camera passes under a concrete overpass and enters a corridor of corrugated metal shacks, following an NPC beneath a web of crisscrossing utility poles and power lines.
